titleStmt.title: SII 4.952: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 952. (A.R. No. 135 of 1893). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastarājanyacūḍāmaṇikiraṇaraṁjitapādasara
sijātuṁḍagu kākatiyyadharādhīśuśrīvākiliki
naṁgarakṣayai prakaṭaśauryya . dhanuṁḍanaṁ baragi yammanujēṁ
druṁḍosagina velanāṁṭināyakasthalamu vriti . ṁcēnu poṁdaṁ
baḍasina pedanīlināyini yagranaṁdanulu bhayā
rttiharulu . puruhūtanibhuṁḍagu bolaiyanā
yuṁḍu nāyakāgraṇi gāḷināyakuṁḍu . nanaṁgaṁ bara
gi ravaninatulapratāpasaṁpannu ladhikabāhubalulu gha
nulu [. 1*] vāri yanuṁgguṁ dammuṁḍu suvarnnagirīṁdrasamā
nadhairyyuṁ ḍaṁbhōruhamitratējuṁḍu vrabhutvasamagruṁ
ḍu vallināyakuṁ . ḍāraṁga nagrajānmati nanaṁtasamaṁcita
dharmma kāryyamulu dhīruṁḍu sēyucuṁḍḍuṁ daga dēvaguru
dvijapūja loppagānu [. 2*] varaguṇaratnarāsiyagu valaiyaku
nu śivapādapadmaṣaṭcaraṇavativratāguṇaviśālayaśōnidhiyanne
māṁbakunu . varasutaṁḍaina pōcaya yavāryyabhujābala
śauryyaśāli suṁdarajitamanmadhuṁḍḍu rucidhāmasutējuṁ ḍudāra
mūrttiyai [. 3*] tama tallidaṁḍrulaku dharmmuvu rājyābhivriddhiyu
ṁgāṁ dana buddhiṁ gōri . śaraguṇaravimitaśakasamāsitapuṣyanu
rapatitithiyunu gurudinamunu . velanāṁṭilōpala vinuti
ṁpaṁgāṁ bēru galigi kriṣṇābdhisaṁgamamunaṁdu polupaina pe
dadīvipuramuna gaṇapatīśvaradēvunaku goni karamunēbha .
yiṁṭi nosagi peyyalēṁbhadi verasi nūrunu nakhaṁḍḍadīpa
munaku bhaktidanaraṁgā ravīṁdutārakamuga nicci vullariyu
nu viḍice bhūnutuṁḍu [. 4*] kāmarājugaḍḍanu sukṣētraṁ yēṁdumu .
śrī .
Digital edition of SII 4.952 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
